title: Flight Tracker Plugin Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the flight tracker plugin with ADS-B data, map backgrounds, and flight plans

enabled.description: Enable or disable the flight tracker plugin

data_source.title: Aircraft Data Source
data_source.description: Where to get live aircraft position data. Choose one setup path: (1) Local receiver — 'skyaware': requires a PiAware/dump1090 ADS-B receiver on your network, most accurate data. (2) Free cloud — 'adsbfi': free global ADS-B feed from adsb.fi, no account or hardware needed. 'adsblol': same idea via adsb.lol. Both free cloud options work worldwide with no sign-up.

fr24_enrichment.title: Free Route Data (FR24 Enrichment)
fr24_enrichment.description: Fetch origin/destination and aircraft type for free in the background using FlightRadar24 data. Works with all data sources. This is the recommended free alternative to a paid FlightAware API key — leave enabled unless you have a specific reason to turn it off.

fr24_enrichment_interval.title: Route Data Refresh Interval (seconds)
fr24_enrichment_interval.description: How often to refresh free FR24 route data in the background. Applies when fr24_enrichment is enabled.

display_duration.description: How long to show the flight tracker display (10-300 seconds)

update_interval.description: Interval in seconds between aircraft data updates

live_update_interval.title: Live Fetch Interval
live_update_interval.description: Faster fetch interval (seconds) used while a flight is locked on for the overhead view, so altitude/distance update smoothly. The ADS-B source is ~1Hz, so a low value is safe. Idle fetches use update_interval.

live_priority.title: Overhead Live Priority
live_priority.description: When enabled, an aircraft entering the proximity radius immediately preempts the normal rotation to show the overhead view for the proximity alert window (see proximity_alert.duration_seconds). Adds a 'flight_tracker_live' rotation slot that stays blank/skipped until a plane is overhead. Leave off for legacy behavior.

skyaware_url.title: SkyAware / dump1090 URL
skyaware_url.description: URL to your local ADS-B receiver's aircraft.json endpoint. Only used when data_source is 'skyaware'. Change this to match your receiver's IP address.

flight_records.title: Flight Records
flight_records.description: Track all-time closest and farthest flights ever seen, shown as extra stats rotation slots

enabled.title: Enable Flight Records
enabled.description: Track and display all-time closest and farthest flights (persisted across restarts)

center_latitude.description: Center latitude for the map display

center_longitude.description: Center longitude for the map display

map_radius_miles.description: Radius in miles to display around center point

zoom_factor.description: Zoom factor to use more of the display (1.0 = normal, higher = more zoomed in)

trail_length.description: Number of trail points to display per aircraft

disable_on_cache_error.description: Disable map background if cache errors occur

custom_tile_server.description: Custom tile server URL (optional, for self-hosted OSM servers). When set, this overrides the tile_provider setting. Leave empty to use the tile_provider setting instead.

distance_miles.description: Distance threshold in miles for proximity alert

duration_seconds.description: Hard cap (seconds) on how long a single overhead flight holds the screen, measured from when it is locked on. The flight shows for this long even if it leaves the radius sooner, and is released after this even if it lingers.

cooldown_seconds.description: After a flight's window ends, suppress the overhead preempt for this many seconds so the normal rotation (weather/clock/sports) gets guaranteed screen time, even if planes remain overhead. Set to 0 to disable the cooldown.

use_offline_database.description: Use offline aircraft database for aircraft type lookups

offline_database_update_interval_days.description: Interval in days between offline database updates

display_mode.title: Display Mode
display_mode.description: Single-view display mode, used only when 'rotation_views' is not set. 'area' shows multi-aircraft list with FlightWall metrics. 'flight_tracking' shows tracked flight details. 'auto' chooses based on context.

rotation_views.title: Rotation Views
rotation_views.description: Which views the display rotation cycles through. Each selected view gets its own rotation slot and an empty/no-content slot is skipped. Leave empty ([]) to show nothing in the normal rotation — useful for an overhead-only board (pair with live_priority). When this field is omitted entirely, the single 'Display Mode' setting is used instead (legacy behavior). The overhead view is not listed here; it is driven by live_priority + proximity_alert.

units.title: Unit System
units.description: Legacy unit system toggle. For finer control use the per-metric options below.

track_format.title: Track Format
track_format.description: Track/heading display format. 'deg' = numeric degrees (090deg), 'cardinal' = compass point (E).

layout.title: Flight Detail Layout
layout.description: Force a specific flight detail layout. Leave empty for auto-selection based on display width.

widescreen_threshold.title: Widescreen Threshold (px)
widescreen_threshold.description: Minimum canvas width in pixels to use the widescreen flight detail layout.

fonts.title: Font Size Overrides
fonts.description: Optional overrides for the three font tiers. Leave values at 0 to use the auto-sized defaults based on display height.

large_size.title: Large Font Size (px)
large_size.description: Override size for the large font tier. 0 = auto.

medium_size.title: Medium Font Size (px)
medium_size.description: Override size for the medium font tier. 0 = auto.

small_size.title: Small Font Size (px)
small_size.description: Override size for the small font tier. 0 = auto.

airport_color.title: Airport Name Color
airport_color.description: RGB color for airport full names in widescreen layout.

max_aircraft.title: Max Aircraft per Page
max_aircraft.description: Maximum aircraft to display per page in area mode.

min_altitude_ft.title: Min Altitude Filter (ft)
min_altitude_ft.description: Minimum altitude in feet for area mode filtering. Set to 0 to disable.

max_altitude_ft.title: Max Altitude Filter (ft)
max_altitude_ft.description: Maximum altitude in feet for area mode filtering. Set to 0 to disable.

aircraft_categories.title: Aircraft Category Filter
aircraft_categories.description: ICAO aircraft categories to display (e.g. A1, A2, A3). Empty list shows all.

tracked_flights.title: Tracked Flights
tracked_flights.description: Flight numbers, callsigns, or tail numbers to track specifically (max 3). E.g. ["AA123", "N12345"]

anchor_airport.title: Anchor Airport
anchor_airport.description: ICAO or IATA airport code to prioritize in area mode (e.g. KTPA or TPA). Arrivals/departures shown first.

route_cache_ttl.title: Route Cache TTL (seconds)
route_cache_ttl.description: How long to cache flight route enrichment data.

enrichment_provider.title: Route Enrichment Provider
enrichment_provider.description: Fallback source for origin/destination data not covered by FR24 enrichment. 'adsbnet': free route lookups via adsb.lol — good coverage for major airlines, no account needed (recommended). 'flightaware': paid FlightAware AeroAPI — highest coverage but requires a paid subscription configured in the FlightAware section below.

header_color.title: Header Color
header_color.description: RGB color for headers/callsigns in area and flight tracking modes.

metric_color.title: Metric Color
metric_color.description: RGB color for metric values (alt, speed, etc.) in area and flight tracking modes.

show_banner.title: Show Title Banner
show_banner.description: Show a 'FLIGHTS' banner for 2 seconds at the start of each display slot.

show_aircraft_icon.title: Show Airline Logos
show_aircraft_icon.description: Show airline logos in area mode (8×8 pixel sprites next to callsigns). Flight detail layouts always show logos in the logo zone when available (52 airlines included as PNG assets).

scroll_speed.title: Scroll Speed
scroll_speed.description: Scroll speed in pixels per frame for long text.

opensky_username.title: OpenSky Username (Advanced)
opensky_username.description: OpenSky Network username. Only needed if you have manually set enrichment_provider to 'opensky' via direct config edit. Leave blank for the standard free setup.

opensky_password.title: OpenSky Password (Advanced)
opensky_password.description: OpenSky Network password. Only needed alongside opensky_username above.

flightaware.title: FlightAware AeroAPI (Paid - Optional)
flightaware.description: OPTIONAL PAID SERVICE — skip this section entirely unless you have a FlightAware AeroAPI subscription. Enabling this will make API calls that are billed at $0.005 each. Free route data via FR24 enrichment (above) works well for most users without any cost.

api_key.description: Your FlightAware AeroAPI key. Leave blank if you are not using FlightAware — the plugin works fully without this.

enabled.description: Enable paid FlightAware API calls. Must be true AND api_key must be set for FlightAware to be used. Disabled by default — do not enable unless you have a paid subscription.

max_api_calls_per_hour.description: Maximum FlightAware API calls per hour

daily_api_budget.description: Maximum FlightAware API calls per day

cache_ttl_hours.description: Flight plan cache time-to-live in hours

min_callsign_length.description: Minimum callsign length to fetch flight plan data

airline_callsign_prefixes.description: List of airline callsign prefixes to prioritize for flight plan fetching

background_service.description: Background service configuration for fetching flight plan data without blocking the display

enabled.description: Enable the background service for flight plan fetching

fetch_interval_hours.description: Interval in hours between background fetch runs

max_calls_per_run.description: Maximum number of flight plan calls fetched per background run

flightaware_api_key.title: FlightAware API Key (deprecated)
flightaware_api_key.description: Deprecated — use the FlightAware section above instead. Kept only for backward compatibility with older configs.

flight_plan_enabled.title: Enable Flight Plans (deprecated - use FlightAware section)
